//: Compiler options for a registry-smoke fixture. Kept BYTE-FOR-BYTE in step with
tools/template-smoke/tsconfig.json: the two checks differ only in WHAT they compile
(one declared closure vs the whole tree), never in HOW. If they drifted, a component
could pass one and fail the other for reasons that have nothing to do with the registry.
baseUrl/paths/include are NOT here — run.mjs writes them per fixture, since only it
